mapper.select: /* 특가상품 상세 정보 조회 */ SELECT M.PROGRESS_TYPE , M.SPECIAL_ID , M.SPECIAL_NM , D.SPECIAL_DTL_ID , D.PRODUCT_ID , D.QTY , IFNULL(D.REMAIN_QTY , D.QTY) REMAIN_QTY , IFNULL(D.LIMIT_QTY , 5) LIMIT_QTY , D.ORG_SALES_PRICE , D.SALES_PRICE , D.SALES_RATE , D.DESCRIPTION , D.PICKUP_TAG , D.TAG_OVERRIDE , P.PRODUCT_NM , C.CATEGORY_NM , SP.PARTNER_NM , M.PROGRESS_TYPE/* 현재 특가 단계 (준비 ,진행중 ) */ , DATE_FORMAT(M.START_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') START_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(M.END_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') END_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(M.PICKUP_END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') PICKUP_END_DATE , (SELECT MAX(NAME) NAME FROM user_mst WHERE USER_ID = (CASE WHEN M.UPDATE_USER IS NOT NULL THEN M.UPDATE_USER ELSE M.CREATE_USER END) ) UPDATE_USER , CASE WHEN M.UPDATE_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN DATE_FORMAT(M.UPDATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(M.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') END UPDATE_DATE FROM special_dtl D LEFT JOIN special_mst M ON D.SPECIAL_ID = M.SPECIAL_ID LEFT JOIN product_mst P ON D.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN category_mst C ON P.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN store_partner_mst SP ON P.PARTNER_ID = SP.PARTNER_ID WHERE M.SPECIAL_ID = #{specialId} ORDER BY D.SPECIAL_DTL_ID ASC

SELECT SRM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID AS REF_ID , SM.SPECIAL_ID AS BIZ_ID , SM.SPECIAL_NM AS TITLE , MIN(P.PRODUCT_NM) AS PRODUCT_NM , COUNT(DISTINCT SRD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID) AS PRODUCT_CNT , SUM(SRD.RESERVATION_CNT) AS QTY , SUM(SRD.RESERVATION_PRICE) AS AMOUNT , SRM.RESERVATION_STATUS AS STATUS , CASE WHEN SRM.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS COMPLETED , DATE_FORMAT(SM.START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PICKUP_START_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(SM.PICKUP_END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PICKUP_END_DATE
, CASE WHEN NOW() >= SM.START_DATE AND (SM.PICKUP_END_DATE IS NULL OR NOW() <= SM.PICKUP_END_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PICKUPABLE , CASE WHEN SM.PICKUP_END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND NOW() > SM.PICKUP_END_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS EXPIRED
FROM special_rsv_mst SRM JOIN special_rsv_dtl SRD ON SRM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID = SRD.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID AND SRD.CANCEL_YN = 'N' JOIN special_dtl SD ON SRD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID JOIN special_mst SM ON SD.SPECIAL_ID = SM.SPECIAL_ID LEFT JOIN product_mst P ON SD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE SRM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND SM.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND SM.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND SRM.RESERVATION_STATUS IN ('RESERVATION','COMPLETE') AND SRD.RESERVATION_CNT > 0 GROUP BY SRM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID, SM.SPECIAL_ID, SM.SPECIAL_NM, SRM.RESERVATION_STATUS, SM.START_DATE, SM.PICKUP_END_DATE ORDER BY PICKUPABLE DESC, SM.START_DATE ASC

SELECT SRM.USER_ID AS USER_ID , UM.NAME AS NAME , UM.PHONE AS PHONE , COUNT(DISTINCT SRM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID) AS ITEM_CNT , SUM(SRD.RESERVATION_CNT) AS TOTAL_QTY , SUM(SRD.RESERVATION_PRICE) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT , MIN(DATE_FORMAT(SM.START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) AS PICKUP_START_DATE , MAX(DATE_FORMAT(SM.PICKUP_END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) AS PICKUP_END_DATE FROM special_rsv_mst SRM JOIN special_rsv_dtl SRD ON SRM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID = SRD.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID AND SRD.CANCEL_YN = 'N' JOIN special_dtl SD ON SRD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID JOIN special_mst SM ON SD.SPECIAL_ID = SM.SPECIAL_ID LEFT JOIN user_mst UM ON SRM.USER_ID = UM.USER_ID WHERE SM.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND SM.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND SRM.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'RESERVATION'
AND SRD.RESERVATION_CNT > 0 AND NOW() >= SM.START_DATE AND (SM.PICKUP_END_DATE IS NULL OR NOW() <= SM.PICKUP_END_DATE)
GROUP BY SRM.USER_ID, UM.NAME, UM.PHONE ORDER BY TOTAL_AMOUNT DESC
